problem id: 5a9d4664
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  11011101 -> 11010001
  00010111 -> 01110000
  00010000 -> 00000000
  11101110 -> 11100001
  11100011 -> 00110001
  01011100 -> 11000000
  10110110 -> 01100001
  11110110 -> 01100001
  10100111 -> 01110001
  11111110 -> 11100001

query: 11101101
predicted answer: 11010001
